zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Radynden於1274年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Walter de Radynden45歲，母親Agatha Muscegros43歲。他於大約1305年與Joan在英國素可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年之前。

zh-hans.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Radynden于1274年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Walter de Radynden45岁，母亲Agatha Muscegros43岁。他于大约1305年与Joan在英国素可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Radynden was born in 1274, in Sussex, England, his father, Walter de Radynden, was 45 and his mother, Agatha Muscegros, was 43. He married Joan about 1305, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died before 1350.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Radynden est né en 1274, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Radynden, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agatha Muscegros, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Joan environ 1305, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1350.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Radynden 1274 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Radynden 45 und seine Mutter Agatha Muscegros 43. Er hat um 1305 in Sussex, England Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1350.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Radynden è nato il nel 1274 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Walter de Radynden, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agatha Muscegros, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Joan circa 1305, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1350.

ja.Of, Radynden, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックス
ja.lifeSummary: John de Radyndenが1274年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Walter de Radyndenは45歳，母Agatha Muscegrosは43歳であった。約1305年にイギリススセックスでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Radynden(이)가 1274년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Radynden(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha Muscegros(은)는 43세였다. 그는 대략 1305년 영국 수세스에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 이전 사망했다.

mn.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Radynden nasceu em 1274, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Radynden, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agatha Muscegros, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan aproximadamente 1305, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1350.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Radynden родился в 1274 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Radynden было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha Muscegros, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1305 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1350 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Radynden nació en 1274, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Radynden, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agatha Muscegros, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Joan aproximadamente 1305, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1350.
